name: Black Bean-And-Corn Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups fresh corn, cut from cob
1 cup canned black beans, rinsed and drained
1 jalapeno pepper, seed removed and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook corn in a small amount of boiling water for 4 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain and cool.
2. Combine corn and remaining ingredients in a bowl. Mix well.
Makes 4 cups of salsa.
Cook's Notes:
1 1/2 cups frozen whole kernel corn may be substituted. For variation and additional flavor, try adding chopped tomatoes and onions or sliced scallions.
